templates.name: Space Facts
templates.hook: Space is stranger than you think.
templates.script: Space is stranger than you think. A day on Venus is longer than its whole year. [Visual: rotating Venus] Neutron stars spin up to 600 times per second. [Visual: pulsar beam] And there are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on every beach on Earth. [Visual: starfield] Mind-blowing, right?

templates.name: Ocean Mysteries
templates.hook: We've explored more of Mars than our own ocean floor.
templates.script: We've mapped more of Mars than our own ocean floor. [Visual: ocean depth map] 80% of the ocean remains completely unmapped. [Visual: underwater drone] Somewhere down there lives a jellyfish that is biologically immortal. [Visual: translucent jellyfish] The deep is still the true final frontier.

templates.name: Productivity Hacks
templates.hook: Stop using a to-do list. Do this instead.
templates.script: Stop using a to-do list. Do this instead. [Visual: crossed-out list] Use a 'done list' — write what you finished, not what looms. [Visual: checkmark] Time-box every task to 25 minutes. [Visual: timer] And batch all notifications into one hour. Your focus is a finite asset. Spend it like money.

templates.name: AI News Flash
templates.script: This AI update changes everything. [Visual: news ticker] A new open model just matched last year's flagship — at a tenth of the cost. [Visual: cost chart] Translation went from 'good enough' to flawless. [Visual: language globe] The pace is not slowing. Build while it's cheap.

templates.name: Coding Tips
templates.hook: One git command that saves your career.
templates.script: One git command that saves your career: git reflog. [Visual: terminal] Deleted a branch? Lost a commit? Reflog remembers everything git forgot. [Visual: log scroll] Pair it with 'git stash' before every risky rebase. [Visual: stash pop] Your future self will thank you.

templates.name: Startup Stories
templates.hook: They pitched from a garage with $0.
templates.script: They pitched from a garage with zero dollars. [Visual: garage] No office, no salary, just a spreadsheet and a stubborn idea. [Visual: spreadsheet] Eighteen months later they served a million users. [Visual: growth curve] The garage was never the limit. Your excuse is.

templates.name: Book Summaries
templates.hook: The one idea from this book you need.
templates.script: The one idea from this book you actually need: atomic habits. [Visual: book cover] You don't rise to your goals, you fall to your systems. [Visual: habit loop] Make good habits obvious, attractive, easy, satisfying. [Visual: 4 laws] Small wins, stacked daily, beat big plans that never start.

templates.name: Fitness Tips
templates.script: A four-minute workout that actually works — the tabata. [Visual: stopwatch] 20 seconds hard, 10 seconds rest, repeat eight times. [Visual: interval timer] No gym, no gear, just your body and a floor. [Visual: bodyweight moves] Do it daily and watch your baseline change.

templates.name: Language Lessons
templates.hook: Learn 10 words a day, fluently in a year.
templates.script: Learn ten words a day and you'll be conversational in a year. [Visual: flashcards] Use them in one sentence each — context beats memorization. [Visual: sentence builder] Listen during your commute, speak in the shower. [Visual: headphones] Consistency, not intensity, is the secret.

templates.name: History Shorts
templates.hook: Oxford is older than the Aztec empire.
templates.script: Oxford University is older than the Aztec empire. [Visual: timeline] When classes began in 1096, the Aztecs hadn't built Tenochtitlan yet. [Visual: contrast map] History isn't a straight line — it's layers of 'what if.' [Visual: layered scrolls] The past is stranger than any fiction.

templates.name: Tech Reviews
templates.hook: I tested it for 30 days so you don't have to.
templates.script: I tested it for thirty days so you don't have to. [Visual: device] The battery lied, the ads didn't. [Visual: battery icon] But the core feature? Genuinely useful, daily. [Visual: checkmark] Verdict: buy it used, skip the subscription. [Visual: price tag] Honest reviews save you money.

templates.name: Motivation
templates.script: The only real failure is quitting. [Visual: sunrise] Every expert was once a beginner who refused to stop. [Visual: progress bars] Your pace doesn't matter — only that you don't stop moving. [Visual: forward arrow] Start ugly. Start small. Just start.
